Class QueryFilterExtensions

EF Core extension methods for applying tenant query filters to entities that implement ITenantEntity.

object

Syntax
public static class QueryFilterExtensions

Methods

| Edit this page View Source

ApplyTenantQueryFilters(ModelBuilder, Func<string?>)

Applies tenant query filters to ALL entity types in the model that implement ITenantEntity. Call inside OnModelCreating.

Declaration
public static ModelBuilder ApplyTenantQueryFilters(this ModelBuilder modelBuilder, Func<string?> currentTenantId)
Parameters
Type Name Description
ModelBuilder modelBuilder
Func<string> currentTenantId
Returns
Type Description
ModelBuilder
| Edit this page View Source

HasTenantFilter<TEntity>(EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity>, Func<string?>)

Applies a global query filter so that all queries for TEntity are automatically scoped to the current tenant. Call inside OnModelCreating.

Declaration
public static EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity> HasTenantFilter<TEntity>(this EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity> builder, Func<string?> currentTenantId) where TEntity : class, ITenantEntity
Parameters
Type Name Description
EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity> builder

The entity type builder.
Func<string> currentTenantId

A delegate that returns the current tenant ID at query time.
Returns
Type Description
EntityTypeBuilder<TEntity>
Type Parameters
Name Description
TEntity

Entity type implementing ITenantEntity.
